Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}What I'm about to tell you is top secret. This is for your ears only, okay?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_000_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}This world is gonna end soon. All of humanity is gonna be completely wiped out.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}But don't worry! We'll be re-creating it as a new land for the survivors—Paradise![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 2 25 25}Well, don't wet your pants or anything! I'm trying to eat a hamburger here.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}When I first found out about this, I had to change my pants afterward.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 4 25 25}I told you, it's top secret! We don't wanna start a mass panic.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}In Paradise, everyone has wings and perfect figures... and they smell like flowers.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}I... I can finally be reborn into a worthwhile body![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}But if we don't do something, you'll get left behind when the world ends.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}And I do not want that to happen! So c'mon—we'll go to Paradise together![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}Don't do it because you're my subject, okay!? Do it because we're... friends.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I get the feeling Suemitsu[n]considers me a good friend.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like our relationship is stronger...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}If we factor in initiation fees, scriptures, and other products... Uhh... It comes out to 132,000 yen! You can take out a loan, right?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}Not to mention you'll get a discount since I'll be referring you, too. You are one lucky guy![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 4 25 25}I-Insane!? YOU'RE the insane one, with that sinful mouth of yours![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 2 25 25}I just wanted to share eternal happiness with you because I care about your soul![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 4 25 25}Y-You what...? Do you have any idea what you're saying!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 2 25 25}I just wanted to share eternal happiness with you because I care about your soul![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 4 25 25}I have to go repent on your behalf! In the name of faith—emergency![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}...I decided to go back to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}
